content.en:
If the Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor knew about the angry scolding of the Fire Desolation, he would definitely have to kill him.

He really didn't get any benefits, and he helped the Fire Gu Clan kill the enemy, and as a result, he was resented.

However, no one expected that Ye Tian had other copies of his body, and he mistakenly underestimated Ye Tian's means.

......

Ye Tian took a while and made a lot of detours before leaving the Sea of Mixed Ruins.

After leaving the Sea of Mixed Ruins, he handed over the Mixed Ruins Stone and other treasure resources to another True Body Replica Body.

This real body copy body only accepts treasure resources, and will never make a move.

Therefore, even if all other clones fall, it will not affect this clone body.

"This harvest is very big, the accumulation of countless years of the Fire Gu Clan, they are afraid that they will go crazy!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Subsequently, he fused the primeval-level ancestor blood that had been copied from the Blood Abyss Heavenly Ancestor.

Soon, the fusion was complete.

"The bottleneck from the eighth blood transformation realm to the ninth blood transformation realm has been relaxed again, and if you copy an ancient level ancestral endowment, you should be able to easily break the bottleneck!" Ye Tian estimated.

He then continued to inquire about information and prepare for a second ransacking plan.

Soon.

He had a new goal.

"Sunfish!"

The strength of the Sunfish Clan is even stronger than that of the Fire Ancient Clan, with a Boundary Breaking Genius of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm and an Ancient Genius of the Eight Blood Transformation Realm.

It was a little difficult for Ye Tian to fight against the entire Sunfish Clan on his own, but he didn't need to fight against the Sunfish Clan, his goal was only the resources of the Sunfish Clan.

According to his understanding, the Sunfish Clan is very special, and the tears of this clan are a kind of treasure, which has a special effect on other blood transformation realms.

Because of this, the Sunfish Clan used to be a captive race, and later a Sunfish genius joined the Chaos Cave, and the entire Sunfish Clan was blessed by the Chaos Cave, which could rise in the Chaos Sea.

And the genius of the Sunfish Clan who joined the Chaos Cave was the primordial-level genius of the Eighth Blood Transformation Realm.

Of course, the Chaos Cave blesses the Sunfish Clan, not just because of that genius, but after the Sunfish Clan develops in a state, you can get more Sunfish Tears!

The more powerful the sunfish tears, the better the effect.

Ye Tian also bought a drop of sunfish tears and found that it could also refine the heart of a cultivator, and the effect was surprisingly good!

The fish tears of the eight Blood Transformation Realm Sunfish can probably help temper the heart of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm primeval-level geniuses.

Of course.

Ye Tian could also snatch a large number of Sun Fish Tears to cultivate the human race, so that the human race continued to give birth to many powerful Blood Transformation Realm cultivators.

This is also the reason why he has thoughts about sunfish tears.

"That eight-time Blood Transformation Realm primordial-level genius of the Sunfish Clan has been staying in the Chaos Cave, so he doesn't need to care about it. But he couldn't be entangled by that Nine Blood Transformation Realm Breaking Genius. I don't know his strength, but if some of his immeasurable bones complete bone transformation, it won't be weak. Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently, he also infiltrated the Sunfish Clan in the same way.

After mixing into the Sunfish Clan, he learned that the Sunfish Tears of the Sunfish Beads were stored at the bottom of the Sun Lake.

Due to the long-term regular contribution of Sunfish Tears to the Chaos Cave and the sale of Sunfish Tears, Sunfish Tears are easy to access.

Moreover, the Sunfish Clan has a rule that each clansman must regularly give birth to Sunfish Tears to the Clan, so that they can be blessed and cultivated by the Clan.

Therefore, there are definitely a lot of sunfish tears among the sunfish family.

this day.

Ye Tian blended in with the caretakers of the Sunfish Clan and entered the Sun Lake.

At this time, he saw the dense cyan points of light at the bottom of the Sun Lake, and each of these cyan points of light was a sunfish tear pool.

"The number of sunfish tears is really large!"

Ye Tian was pleasantly surprised.

Of course, the sunfish tears are also divided into grades, and the highest here is the sunfish tears flowing out of the eight blood transformation realm sunfish.

As for the sunfish tears that flowed out of the Nine Blood Transformation Realms, they were not kept here.

Ye Tian waited for some years, and after making sure that there was no problem, he went straight to work.

Thundered!!!

One by one, the magic circles were destroyed by Ye Tian.

Subsequently, his replica body took action.

Bang bang bang!!

A sunfish was blown up by him.

Then, he broke into the place where the sunfish tears were kept.

"Close!"

"Close!"

"Collect it again!"

Ye Tian put away the most valuable sunfish tears, but every sunfish tear pool has a magic circle, and it takes a moment to break it.

Therefore, after he collected a batch of sunfish tears, a while passed.

"Gotta go!"

He knew that if he didn't leave, it would not be easy to leave, and he would definitely be dragged back.

Swish!

Ye Tian used Taigu to move and quickly escaped.

......

"Dare to snatch the sunfish tears of our sunfish clan!!!"

After the Sunfish Clan's Nine Blood Transformation Realm Breaking Genius Yin Gong found out, he rushed over as soon as possible, and he also notified the Chaos Cave.

It's a pity that he can't intercept Ye Tian, the speed is too slow.

And Ye Tian still used the same way to transfer the Sunfish Tears to another replica body to attract firepower by himself.

In the end, the Chaos Cave was furious this time, and directly dispatched three primordial-level geniuses of the Nine Blood Transformation Realm to surround and kill him.

After all, the value of the Sunfish Clan is much higher than that of the Fire Ancient Clan, and the Chaos Cave naturally attaches great importance to it.

Therefore, Ye Tian's true body copied his body and did not escape, but before the other party arrived, he hid his aura and appearance, and then directly blew himself up.

Therefore, the Chaos Cave also didn't know Ye Tian's identity.

However, after this time, the powerhouses of the Mixed Ruins Cave went out one by one, looking for something, and even outsiders were investigated one by one.

Fortunately, Ye Tian copied the copied body of a native blood transformation realm creature of the Chaos Sea in time and blended into a small race, so he evaded the search.

"I can't do anything like this in a short period of time, the success rate is too low!"

Ye Tian muttered.

this day.

The existence of the Bone Transformation Realm in the Chaos Ruins Cave was dispatched, and after searching the Chaos Ruins Sea for a long time, nothing was found, so I gave up.

......

"Then I won't snatch it in the Sea of Ruins. In the future, the main thing is to find the location of the creatures in the bone transformation realm, and see if we can meet a few primeval-level ancestors!"

Ye Tian planned.

For example, a bone transformation realm creature like the Ancient Chaos Dragon, if he touches it, he can obtain an Ancient Grade Ancestral Endowment.

In the years that followed, he walked around, searching for primeval-level ancestral endowments in various areas of the Hunhe River Boundary Rift.

Finally, on this day, he found the third primeval-level ancestral endowment.
